description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing human figure, likely of East Asian origin, adorned in flowing robes and intricate jewelry. The figure stands on a textured stone base and is backed by a tall, rectangular panel featuring ornate, patterned artwork in red, gold, and cream tones. The figure's hands are raised in a gentle, open gesture, and the facial features are serene and finely detailed. The backing panel appears to be made of wood or a similar material, with a weathered, aged finish. The overall appearance suggests a religious or cultural significance, possibly representing a deity or revered figure. The sculpture is visually striking, with a harmonious blend of stone and decorative elements.
description: A detailed standing human figure in robes, backed by an ornate, patterned panel and mounted on a stone base. The sculpture features intricate details and a serene expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full figure, ornate panel, and detailed facial features and attire.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the figure, the thickness of the backing panel, and the layered garments.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, weathered surface of the backing panel with no visible figure details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the figure and the structure of the base and panel.
attribute_subject_matter: standing human figure in traditional attire with decorative panel
attribute_location_context: No specific context is visible; the sculpture appears to be photographed against a plain background.
